artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA system showing an Analog Tag Faceplate for a level transmitter with signal feedback and control icons.
artifact_blurb: A detailed screenshot from the Hazen SCADA Standards Appendix A documentation, illustrating a specific 'Analog Tag Faceplate' configuration for a level transmitter. The interface displays real-time signal feedback via a graph and includes standard operational control icons, demonstrating compliance with established SCADA visualization standards.
